description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped yard, featuring a main residential structure with a low, horizontal profile and a large attached garage. The house is surrounded by tall evergreen trees, decorative shrubs, and flower beds, with a paved driveway leading up to the garage. The property is enclosed on three sides by tall, white privacy walls, which are adorned with scenic mural panels depicting a lakeside or riverside landscape. The roof of the bungalow is a combination of gable and hip styles, with a mix of gray and brown roofing materials. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, and there is a visible swimming pool in the backyard area. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a large garage, surrounded by landscaped gardens, tall trees, and privacy walls featuring scenic murals. The house has a low profile, mixed roof styles, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, landscaped yard, and mural-adorned privacy walls.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the privacy wall, with minimal visibility of the house and a glimpse of landscaping and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the privacy wall, backyard landscaping, and a small portion of the pool and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with privacy wall, visible landscaping, and a partial view of the house and driveway.
